titleStmt.title: SII 9.606: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 606. (A.R. No. 62 of 1904.) ON A SLAB LYING IN THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE UNDALI SANGAMMANAGUDI AT HALUGODE, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1466, Śōbhakṛit, Dvitīya-Śrāvaṇa, śu. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1543 August 9, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya. It records that the village, Chenakuṇṭe, granted in the reign of Kṛisṇarāya-Mahārāya for the service of god Saṅgamēśvara of Kurugōḍu being resumed, Liṅgarāja, son-in-law of Guṇḍaya-Mahārāya, agent of the king, revived the gift of Chenakuṇṭe and its gardens for the same service.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgasiracuṁbitacaṁdracāmaracāravē tre
yilōkyanagararaṁbhamūlastaṁbhaya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhuda
yaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1466 neya śōbhakrutusaṁvacharada
dvitīyaśravaṇa suda 10 miyalu śrīmatu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēsvara rājādhirāja rajaparamēśvara śrīsadaśivamahārayaru . pratvī
rājyaṁgaiutiralu . prāku kṛṣṇarāyamaharayaru ku
ṟugōḍa saṁgamēśvaradēvarige sarvamānyavagi koṭṭa cenakuṁṭeya
grāmau Acutarayamaharayara kaladalu kiṟukuḷa Upa
va grāma haḷagi khilivagi yiralāgi sadaśivarayara karyakarttara gu
ṁḍayamahārāyara Aḷiya liṁgarajagaḷu sadāśivaraya
vāgabēkeṁdu kurugōḍa saṁgamēśvaradēvarige sa
cenakuṁṭeya grākke biṭi koṭaṇa
sadāsivarāyarige punyavagabēkeṁdu
cenakuṁṭe grāma tōṭa hasaru mānya sahavāgi
neredu koṭeU tanikanu mudaiyanu
Idake Āroṁbaru taṁpidaru matrugaḷa koṁda pā
pake hōharu sivācarake kulacarake hōharu
śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.606 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
